inputs.fcf_source: Normalized owner cash ~$10.5M: between FY2025 operating cash $9.19M ($14.1/sh) and FY2024 $16.35M ($25.2/sh); excludes 2025 $8.9M oil/gas sale gain; Q1 2026 coal idling headwind
inputs.shares_source: 2025-12-31 Annual Report: 651,498 common shares outstanding at December 31, 2025
inputs.book_per_share_caveat: Pardee shareholders equity $134.2M / shares; minerals and timber carried at depletion/historical cost; independent reserve appraisals cited but not fully marked to fair value on balance sheet
inputs.normalization_note: Family-controlled OTC natural-resource holdco; Lawrence base uses normalized distributable cash, not 2025 EPS $25.09 inflated by one-time property sale.

optionality_gate.floor_value_note: Illustrative fair NAV ~$240/sh [Assumption]; GAAP book ~$205/sh understates reserves; price ~$274 still above overlay NAV
optionality_gate.overlay_nav_note: [Assumption] reserve appraisals + rural real estate marks above GAAP book; still below OTC market price
optionality_gate.notes: Price premium to book limits dhando; stance gate uses normalized owner-cash ten-year path, not book floor alone

gaap_vs_fair_value.policy_source: 2025 Annual Report: coal/oil/gas at depletion; timber at cost; reserve tables based on independent consulting appraisals

not_in_model_requires_refresh: Per-ton fair value of 128.1 mm tons metallurgical and 206.2 mm tons thermal coal reserves vs carrying values
47,000-acre hardwood timber sale process (no-sale April 2025) and carbon-market bid economics
Roanoke Virginia school solar $14.4M partnership run-rate after 2025 close
Portugal almond farm recovery after 2025 rainfall losses

segments_or_options.label: New metallurgical coal mine development (surface + underground)
segments_or_options.evidence: 2025 Annual Report: two new met coal mines expected to benefit 2026+; Q1 2026 major mine idling offsets near-term

segments_or_options.label: 47,000-acre WV hardwood timber block (retained mineral rights)
segments_or_options.nav_assumption: [Assumption] carbon/natural-capital bid failed; retained coal/O&G rights deter buyers; per-acre mark below 2025 rural land sale comps
segments_or_options.evidence: 2025 Annual Report: 47k-acre sale initiative ended no-sale April 2025

segments_or_options.label: Roanoke VA school rooftop solar partnerships (9 installations)
segments_or_options.evidence: July 2025 $14.4M commitment for 90% equity in four partnerships; 25-year income stream

segments_or_options.label: Western PA 8,800-acre mineral sale (completed)
segments_or_options.evidence: April 2025 $8.9M sale of dormant minerals; ~$10.86/sh one-time EPS contribution in 2025

segments_or_options.label: 2025 Marcellus mineral acreage acquisitions
segments_or_options.evidence: $600k WV/PA mineral acreage with 50-year productive life from Marcellus wells

segments.label: Metallurgical coal royalties
segments.source: FY2025 revenue $16.8M; Q1 2026 down 25% YoY; mine idling Feb 2026

segments.label: Oil & gas royalties
segments.source: FY2025 revenue $8.4M; Appalachian gas price recovery; excludes 2025 one-time sale

segments.label: Timber & surface
segments.source: FY2025 revenue $6.7M; record rural real estate sales partially offset timber weakness

segments.label: Alternative energy (solar)
segments.source: FY2025 revenue $2.1M; 13.0 MW capacity after Roanoke additions

segments.label: Agriculture (table grapes, almonds)
segments.source: FY2025 revenue $12.9M; CA grapes strong; Portugal almond losses

options.label: New met coal mine development
options.base_terminal_rationale: P=40% x $35/sh full reserve development value [Assumption]
options.evidence: 2025 Annual Report strategic focus; offset by Q1 2026 idling

options.label: Hardwood timber block option
options.base_terminal_rationale: Partial mark on 47k acres retained; carbon sale failed

segment_build.corporate_drag_note: General & administrative ~$3.7M FY2025; allocated per share

bear.notes: Coal idling persists; met coal pricing weak; specials not repeated; owner cash $12/sh trough

base.notes: Normalized owner cash $16/sh; regular dividend $7.20 maintained; no large asset sales in base

bull.notes: New mines online; gas prices firm; Roanoke solar ramps; occasional special dividends

human_review.notes: OTC Pink thin market (~7% turnover in 2025); family-controlled; no SEC 10-K; price and book from 2025 Annual Report and Yahoo 2026-06-10.

growth_explanation.base_mechanism: Diversified royalty streams: Appalachian met coal and gas, timber/surface leases, California table grapes, and expanding solar portfolio (Roanoke VA schools)
growth_explanation.bear_risk: Q1 2026 coal mine idling and China met-coal export pressure; premium OTC price vs book limits margin of safety

theory_implied.derivation: segment_build owner-cash weighted blend (growth only; exit from scenarios.base)

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Minerals/timber at depletion/historical cost; independent reserve appraisals in annual report

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / acreage?
option_scan.evidence: 128.1 mm tons met coal, 206.2 mm tons thermal, 644 mmbf hardwood, 21.3 bcfe gas reserves

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Portugal almond farm operating losses in 2025; burden in agriculture segment

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Roanoke 25-year solar contracts; new met coal mine development timeline

option_scan.question: Private stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Equity method investments modest; no holdco-style private marks

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution?
option_scan.evidence: Regular $7.20/sh plus lumpy specials ($15 in 2025, $25 in 2024)

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Rural real estate sales and gas price recovery already in 2025 revenue mix

paths.label: Segment-derived growth (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

paths.label: NAV overlay dated payoff (7yr to overlay base)
paths.weight_why: Answers a different question (NAV convergence) than 7yr cash-flow IRR; capped weight to avoid theory conflation.
weight_falsifiers: NAV overlay base not updated when segment build or filings change >10%
floor_pass false but weight above 15% without [HUMAN REVIEW]

flags: NAV overlay is a different theory (asset payoff vs cash-flow IRR); weight capped at 10% to limit theory conflation.

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

top_dissents.label: Mohnish Pabrai
top_dissents.falsifier: dhando -> none OR net-debt/EBITDA > 3 OR bear return < -15%

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].
